venue.feature2_desc: Join us to celebrate 15 years of collaboration, growth and success.

guest.label: SPECIAL GUEST
guest.name: Mateusz Kusznierewicz
guest.headline:
How to keep winning for years?
Lessons from an Olympic champion for business
guest.description: How do you win not just once, but over the years? In his talk Mateusz Kusznierewicz will speak about consistency, resilience to change, and habits that help achieve outstanding results both in sport and in business.
